message:
fix(lint): add ASX_CHECKPOINT_WAIVER annotations to 78 bounded loops

All kernel-path for/while loops now carry either an asx_checkpoint()
call or an ASX_CHECKPOINT_WAIVER("reason") annotation. This clears the
lint-checkpoint gate (160 loops checked, 0 violations).

Waiver categories:
- bounded init over static array (combinator/epoch init loops)
- bounded arena scan (diagnostic/replay/snapshot arena iteration)
- bounded poll loop (combinator poll/drain loops)
- bounded aggregation (result collection, hash computation)
- bounded slot search (channel/sync free-slot searches)
- bounded JSON serialization (snapshot/replay JSON output)
- bounded hash computation (det_hash probing/hashing)

bd-ux4w

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
